sellers_note: Elevate your driving experience with this exceptional 2022 Nissan Rogue SV. Meticulously maintained and backed by a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this vehicle is ready to provide you with years of reliable performance.- FULLY DETAILED- MULTI POINT INSPECTION - OIL CHANGED- SERVICE RECORDS!- CHROME REAR BUMPER PROTECTOR- FLOOR MATS W/1-PIECE CARGO AREA PROTECTOR- BLACK SPLASH GUARDS (SET OF 4)Boasting an impressive 1.5L I3 Turbocharged engine paired with a smooth-shifting CVT transmission and all-wheel drive, the Rogue SV delivers an engaging and confident driving experience. With an EPA-estimated 28 city / 35 highway MPG, this Nissan offers exceptional fuel efficiency to keep you on the road longer.The well-appointed interior of the Rogue SV is designed with your comfort and convenience in mind. Enjoy features like automatic climate control, power driver's seat, and a premium audio system with SiriusXM radio. The spacious cargo area and 60/40 split-folding rear seats provide the versatility to accommodate all your lifestyle needs.Safety is a top priority, and the Rogue SV is equipped with a comprehensive suite of advanced driver assistance technologies. From automatic emergency braking and lane departure warning to blind spot monitoring and rear parking sensors, you'll have peace of mind behind the wheel.This 2022 Nissan Rogue SV is a remarkable value, offering premium features, impressive performance, and uncompromising quality.
